title: SYNTHESIZE output — machine-readable assumptions log A*

aprd_ref.description: path to aPRD draft or frozen version

baseline_aprd_ref.description: brownfield only: path to aprd.frozen.md extended; null for greenfield

aprd_version.description: version emitted; greenfield: v1; brownfield: vN+1

assumptions.description: one per gap in 04; A* stable, contiguous

id.description: stable assumption id; A* contiguous, never renumbered

gap_ref.description: gap id from 04-gaps.json this assumption resolves

text.description: clean-prose decision, same as the aPRD assumption text

source.description: provenance: how the assumption was settled

chosen_interpretation.description: verbatim chosen interpretation from 04, or client's free text for client-described

items.description: interpretation from 04 not chosen; becomes an OUT_OF_SCOPE exclusion

flagged_requirements.description: empty when every requirement has a testable AC; each entry must have a matching [FLAGGED] marker in the draft

req_ref.description: requirement id R* that could not get a binary AC

reason.description: why no binary AC could be written for this requirement

touch_set.description: brownfield: slices the version bump invalidates; omit or [] for greenfield

requirements.description: requirement ids this touch-set entry covers

slices.description: slice ids this touch-set entry covers

seam.description: seam-extended only: the seam being extended

contract_ref.description: contract id CT* at the seam

note.description: explanation of why this slice/requirement re-enters remaining_sequence
